details: The agent correctly completed both steps: (1) navigated to https://httpbin.org/status/404 and reported the net::ERR_HTTP_RESPONSE_CODE_FAILURE error from the 404 response, and (2) successfully navigated to https://httpbin.org/html and reported the page content including the title 'Herman Melville - Moby-Dick' and the Moby-Dick excerpt about the blacksmith Perth.
